overall.description: A first-person walk through a foggy, neon-lit urban outskirts at night in a video game (Cyberpunk 2077). The camera moves along a roadside past a commercial building with digital billboards, transitioning to an open parking lot with abandoned vehicles and scattered pedestrians, with a futuristic city skyline visible in the hazy distance.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a foggy night alongside a multi-lane road, with a large concrete commercial building wall on the right and a futuristic city skyline visible through the haze ahead. The camera walks forward at a steady pace as vehicles pass by on the road, briefly obscured by bushes at one point. Street lights and utility poles line the path, creating pools of light in the fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial building exterior with large digital advertisements

events.description: large illuminated digital billboards become visible on the building wall casting colored light
road opens up into a large parking area with abandoned vehicles visible ahead

agents.ego_description: walking past the corner of the building, passing illuminated neon advertisements on the right

glowing commercial signs with cyberpunk aesthetic attached to building
vertical light phenomenon or rainbow visible in the foggy sky above the city

segments.scene_description: As the camera continues walking, the building wall on the right reveals large illuminated digital billboards and neon signage casting colored light onto the wet pavement. The concrete building gradually recedes into the distance as the scene opens up toward a large parking area. A mysterious atmospheric light beam becomes visible in the foggy sky above the distant city skyline.

scene_state.functional_zone: open parking lot with abandoned vehicles and scattered pedestrians

events.description: pedestrians come into view standing and walking in the parking lot
camera passes by abandoned yellow vehicles parked in the lot

agents.ego_description: walking through the open parking area, passing abandoned cars and scattered pedestrians

group of people standing and conversing near the vehicles

entered.detail: derelict yellow cars parked haphazardly in the lot with doors open
wet asphalt parking area with large puddles reflecting lights

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide parking lot filled with abandoned yellow vehicles and scattered pedestrians. The camera walks forward through the foggy open area, passing by people walking and standing near the derelict cars. The commercial building and its neon signs fall away behind, replaced by an expansive view of the fog-shrouded city skyline ahead with utility poles lining the distant road.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a foggy roadside that gradually opens into a wide, derelict parking lot beneath a distant city skyline. It begins by walking past a concrete commercial building wall and utility poles, with vehicles passing by on a multi-lane road partially obscured by roadside bushes. As the camera advances, the building wall reveals glowing neon signage and digital billboards that cast colored light onto the wet pavement before the structure recedes to reveal a mysterious light beam piercing the hazy sky. The scene then expands into a vast parking area filled with abandoned yellow vehicles and scattered pedestrians, leaving the neon lights behind. Finally, the camera moves through this open, fog-shrouded space toward an expansive view of the futuristic skyline and distant utility poles.
